zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Hassall於1422年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿可利德時，她的父親Robert Hassall38歲，母親Margery Beardsley40歲。她於1441年與Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley在英國德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年3月16日在英國德比夏爾分尼 本特利享年45歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 阿莫藍德艾代維特英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Hassall于1422年出生在英国英格兰爾阿可利德时，她的父亲Robert Hassall38岁，母亲Margery Beardsley40岁。她于1441年与Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley在英国德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年3月16日在英国德比夏爾分尼 本特利享年45岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 阿莫藍德艾代維特英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Hassall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hassell
meanings: habitational name from Hassall (Cheshire), from Old English hætse ‘witch’ (a shortened form of hægtesse) + halh ‘nook, corner of land’.
variant of Askell, with metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/ and the addition of prosthetic H-; see Haskell and Axtell .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Hassall was born in 1422, in Arclid, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Hassall, was 38 and her mother, Margery Beardsley, was 40. She married Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley in 1441, in Derby, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 16 March 1467, in Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in England, Edewecht, Ammerland, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Hassall est née en 1422, à Arclid, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Hassall, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery Beardsley, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley en 1441, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1467, à Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

Sie hat 1441 in Derby, Derbyshire, England Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Hassall è nata il nel 1422 nel Arclid, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Hassall, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margery Beardsley, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley nel 1441, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 16 marzo 1467, nel Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Hassallが1422年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルクリドで生まれた時，父Robert Hassallは38歳，母Margery Beardsleyは40歳であった。1441年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでSir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年3月16日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアフエニー ベントリーで45歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス アンメルランドイーデウエチトエングランドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Edmund King and Martyr Churchyard, F: 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 아머랜드 에데wch트 잉글랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Hassall(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 아c리드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hassall(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Beardsley(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1441년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 3월 16일 영국 더비실르 펜이 벤틀리에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 아머랜드 에데wch트 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Hassall nasceu em 1422, em Arclid, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Hassall, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margery Beardsley, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley em 1441, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1467, em Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.St. Edmund King and Martyr Churchyard, F: энгланд, эдюечт, ландкрис аммирланд, ниедирсачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Hassall родилась в 1422 г. в местности арклид, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Hassall было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Beardsley, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley в 1441 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 16 марта 1467 г. в местности фенни бентли, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности энгланд, эдюечт, ландкрис аммирланд, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Hassall nació en 1422, en Arclid, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Hassall, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margery Beardsley, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas John Beresford' Lord of Bentley en 1441, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1467, en Fenny Bentley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en England, Edewecht, Landkreis Ammerland, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
